title: Product Marketing Specialist (m/f/d)
matched_skills: Presentation skills / public speaking (HSBC C-level reporting, ECE Group presentations)
Competitive analysis (market research, GTM at IoT/GRG roles)
GTM / product launch (IoT hardware product launches, Moli Media campaigns)
missing_skills: Electrical engineering degree or semiconductor domain expertise
core_responsibilities: Develop and execute product marketing strategies for semiconductor / sensor solutions
Create customer-facing materials: datasheets, presentations, competitive comparisons
Support product launches and GTM execution across EMEA/global markets
Conduct competitive analysis and market sizing (TAM/SAM/SOM)
Collaborate with engineering, sales, and regional teams on product positioning
recommended_emphasis: Bridge semiconductor gap by highlighting IoT hardware product launch experience (Intelligent Power Corporation / GRG roles)
Emphasise cross-functional and C-level stakeholder management — directly matches role requirements
Showcase B2B demo / trade fair / client-facing communication experience
Position Excel/PowerPoint proficiency as strong match for material creation responsibilities
Stress willingness to develop domain expertise quickly — learning curve is the main gap
Multilingual capability (EN C1, DE B1+, ZH C2) is a strong differentiator for global semiconductor firm

company_info.size_raw: over 21,000 professionals in more than 30 countries
